title: SR 13-18: Supervisory Letter SR 13-18 on         Uniform Agreement on the Classification and Appraisal of Securities Held by Depository Institutions  -- October 29, 2013
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 13-18 on         Uniform Agreement on the Classification and Appraisal of Securities Held by Depository Institutions  -- October 29, 2013

issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated asset.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
